description: The Audio Zita Reverb component can be used to create echo effects (called ZitaParameters) onto audio clips, or on listeners in an area using the Awwdio system. To see how to use it with audio listeners, see AudioListener.

fields.InDelay: Delay in ms before reverberation begins.
fields.Crossover: Crossover frequency separating low and middle frequencies (Hz).
fields.RT60Low: Time (in seconds) to decay 60db in low-frequency band.
fields.RT60Mid: Time (in seconds) to decay 60db in mid-frequency band.
fields.HighFrequencyDamping: Frequency (Hz) at which the high-frequency T60 is half the middle-band's T60.
fields.EQ1Frequency: Center frequency of second-order Regalia Mitra peaking equalizer section 1.
fields.EQ1Level: Peak level in dB of second-order Regalia-Mitra peaking equalizer section 1
fields.EQ2Frequency: Center frequency of second-order Regalia Mitra peaking equalizer section 2.
fields.EQ2Level: Peak level in dB of second-order Regalia-Mitra peaking equalizer section 2.
fields.Mix: 0 is all dry, 1 is all wet.

methods.SetPreset: Runs the provided action to apply a preset.
methods.PresetOff: Sets the values to not have an effect at all
methods.PresetGeneric: Sets the values to a preset that replicates this button's name
